title: Anathallis spannageliana
taxonomy: Anathallis spannageliana is a species of orchid in the genus Anathallis. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. Anathallis spannageliana further falls under the subfamily Epidendroideae and tribe Epidendreae. The plant is a type of epiphyte, which means it grows on other plants without deriving nutrients from them. Anathallis spannageliana is native to the tropical regions of South America.
uses: Anathallis spannageliana is a rare orchid species, and unfortunately, there's limited information available on its medicinal uses.
